setup.title: System Initialization
setup.subtitle: Welcome. Complete the following configuration to start using the system.

databaseStep.title: Database Check
databaseStep.description: Verify database and RabbitMQ initialization status
databaseStep.heading: Database connection is ready
databaseStep.body: The system can access {0} and is ready for initialization.
databaseStep.info: The initialization flow will rebuild baseline system seed data and then replace the administrator account with the values you provide.

rabbitmqStep.heading: RabbitMQ Topology Check
rabbitmqStep.body: The deployment flow prepares the required vhost, exchange, queue, DLX, and DLQ. Review the status here and initialize them manually if needed.

adminStep.title: Admin Account
adminStep.heading: Administrator account
adminStep.body: Set the primary administrator credentials used for the first login.
adminStep.warning: Existing baseline administrator data will be regenerated and then overwritten with the credentials above during initialization.

modeStep.title: Usage Mode
modeStep.heading: Usage mode
modeStep.body: Select how the system should be marked after initialization.
modeStep.defaultDesc: Recommended for real deployment and regular backend usage.
modeStep.demoDesc: Marks the environment as demonstration-oriented while still rebuilding baseline system data only.
modeStep.defaultInfo: Recommended for regular deployment. Rebuilds only baseline system data.
modeStep.demoInfo: Keeps system initialization minimal while marking the environment as demo.

confirmStep.title: Complete Initialization
confirmStep.heading: Ready to complete initialization
confirmStep.body: Confirm the following settings, then click "Initialize system" to start configuration.

confirmation.applySeedMode: Apply {0} for baseline system data only
confirmation.excludeDemo: Keep demo or business seed data excluded

messages.databaseNotReady: Initialization status is not ready yet. Confirm the database connection first.
messages.rabbitmqNotReady: RabbitMQ topology is not initialized yet. Complete RabbitMQ setup first.
